title: The repatriation of export amounts from Congo, Mali, and South Sudan
bodyHtml:
The full exemption is granted for the repatriation of export amounts from the countries listed in Annex 2 of the Central Bank of the Republic of Turkey Export General Directive, while exemption is granted for saving fifty percent of the amounts for the countries listed in Annex 3.

According to an announcement made by the Turkish Exporters Assembly (TIM), in order to evaluate the addition of the countries in question to the countries granted full exemption for export transactions, such as those made to Congo, Mali, and South Sudan, more comprehensive information is needed regarding the problems encountered by our exporters in the export transactions carried out to these countries.

In this context, it is requested that the problems encountered by our exporters (if any, along with the relevant documents) be sent to the email address yapiciogluk@oaib.org.tr until the end of business hours on April 14, 2023, to be conveyed to the Turkish Exporters Assembly.
